name: Lulas Sevilhana
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the squids inside and out, removing the 'bone' and keeping only the bag-like bodies. Pat dry.
2. Cut into rings about 1/2 inch in diameter.
3. Season with salt, pepper, and lemon juice.
4. Make a batter by mixing water, flour, egg yolk, and salt. Set aside for 30 minutes to rest.
5. Beat the egg white until firm and fold it into the batter.
6. Sprinkle the squid rings with plain flour and dip them in the batter to cover completely.
7. Deep-fry in very hot oil (do not exceed 3 minutes) until golden brown. Serve immediately with lemon wedges and parsley sprigs.
